paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.05 as of July 17, representing a 2.02% increase from the prior close and a 36.32% decrease over the last 20 trading sessions. There has been 1 new news item in the last 24 hours.

Recent news includes a report from simplywall.st on July 17, discussing the resignation of director designee Miles Everson due to governance concerns and the completion of a $375 million convertibles deal. This news may be driving current interest in the company.

There have been various SEC filings recently, including an 8-K form on July 15 detailing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another 8-K form on July 13 disclosing Miles Everson's resignation. Additionally, there was 1 Form 4 filing and 19 proxy solicitation filings in the feed, with 3 new social posts in the last 24 hours.
